title: Vertical Position
text: Vertical Position Vertical position of the button in the available space: Top , Center (default), or Bottom . Value Description (default) Use the position specified in the .ini file. If no entry is specified, use the system default of Center . Top Button is displayed at the top of the available space Center Button is displayed in the center of the available space Bottom Button is displayed at the bottom of the available space This is a static property and cannot be set in ProcScript. Applies To CommandButton Was this topic helpful? Like Dislike
